SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-17-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-17-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO IMELDA GALLEBO TACHIHARA BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAY-17-2012 AT 8:30AM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TACHIHARA, ERNEST $2,892.00 PRINCIPAL, $180.75 INTEREST, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,192.75, PLAINITFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT, IMELDA GALLEBO TACHIHARA IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TACHIHARA, ERNEST
